ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the district (e.g., rural, urban) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the district */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the district */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the state belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the state (e.g., rural, urban) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case data entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "total_positive_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of positive cases */,
  "discharged_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of discharged cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of active cases */,
  "death_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of death cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases */,
  "test_conducted" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health facility */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the facility is located in */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the health facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the health facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the health facility */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the health facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the health facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_facilities_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the country (e.g., rural, urban) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinated individuals */,
  "first_dose" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who received the first dose */,
  "second_dose" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who received the second dose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vaccination data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vaccination data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests_conducted" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test data entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests */,
  "negative_tests" INTEGER /* Number of negative tests */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_conducted_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the patient belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms exhibited by the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_bed_capacity" (
  "bed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bed data entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the data belongs to */,
  "bed_type" TEXT /* Type of bed (e.g., ICU, general ward) */,
  "available_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available beds */,
  "occupied_beds" INTEGER /* Number of occupied beds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bed data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bed data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_bed_capacity_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)
